channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 iad1tya/EchoTube (162 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iad1tya

📝 Repository: iad1tya/EchoTube

📄 Descrizione: Open-source YouTube client - enjoy an ad-free experience in a lightweight app, no account required.

⭐ Stelle: 162

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: adfree kotlin kotlin-android kotlin-multiplatform youtube youtube-api youtube-client youtube-dl youtube-player youtube-playlist youtube-video ytclient

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-18T22:00:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-24T04:52:06Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 skydoves/compose-animations (107 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: skydoves

📝 Repository: skydoves/compose-animations

📄 Descrizione: ⚡️ A collection of Jetpack Compose animations for the best practices. Tweak literals at the top of any file, save, and watch the motion morph in real-time.

⭐ Stelle: 107

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android animations compose compose-hotswan compose-ui hot-reload hotswan jetpack jetpack-compose skydoves

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-05T01:15:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-06T05:13:08Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 Hidden-Node/GooseRelayVPN-AndroidClient (39 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Hidden-Node

📝 Repository: Hidden-Node/GooseRelayVPN-AndroidClient

📄 Descrizione: GooseRelayVPN Android client: a SOCKS5 VPN with profile-based setup, live logs, and JSON import/export that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES-256-GCM, domain-fronted).

⭐ Stelle: 39

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: aes-gcm http-proxy mitm proxy sni socks5 tunnel tunneling vpn vpn-client

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-28T22:33:54Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-01T04:42:48Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 kdroidFilter/ComposePdf (23 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: kdroidFilter

📝 Repository: kdroidFilter/ComposePdf

📄 Descrizione: A Kotlin Multiplatform PDF rendering and text-extraction library built on top of pdfium and Compose Multiplatform. Compose-first API, and a sample desktop/mobile reader with thumbnails, progressive rendering, and selectable text.

⭐ Stelle: 23

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: compose pdf
